title: PUBLIC HOUSING - 211info
text: SALEM HOUSING AUTHORITY PUBLIC HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Manages multiple income-based rental public housing properties and fields complaints about public housing. 360 Church Street SE Salem, OR 973013707 Eligibility: Low-income families, older adults, and people with disabilities with US citizenship or eligible immigration status Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-4pm. Closed all major holidays. Email (503) 588-6368 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 588-6368 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None for pre-application. Rents vary based upon properties. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Keizer and Salem (within the urban growth boundary, Marion County only) Services: Housing Complaints * Public Housing Residents Public Housing Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - SECTION 8 HOUSING PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALEM HOUSING AUTHORITY
